case_title: OBREGON, FELISA vs. VIVA TEE SHIRTS, INC

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT VIVA TEE SHIRTS, INC

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, MOTION TO ADD PRESENTACION BARRETO AS JDGMNT DEBTOR;INT;ATT;COST, CALENDAR OF JUL-27-1994, DENIED ; ATTORNEY'S FEES FOR MOTION TO ADD P. BARRETTO - DENIED; ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COST TO ENFORCE THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $355.50 - GRANTED.
